title: Analytics - Device Deleted
scenario: Log device removal event with default analytics and device-specific fields when a device is deleted in the app
steps: Open the app and navigate to the device list.
Observe the analytics dashboard for the event.
Check the tracked fields: Device Name, Device PID, Device Serial.
Verify default analytics elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country and gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment.
Wait a few hours and check if event counts update.
expected: The device removal event is logged with all default analytics elements and additional fields (Device Name, Device PID, Device Serial). Event counts update after a few hours.
